headline: FICO and Richard Childress Racing Continue Financial Literacy Partnership for 2026 NASCAR Cup Series Season
summary: RIDGEWAY, Va., March 04, 2026--FICO and RCR team up with Kyle Busch for a multi-race 2026 NASCAR partnership focused on teaching fans financial literacy and credit basics.
